subject: math
title: Solving Word Problems
content: Word problems describe math situations using sentences. To solve them, read carefully, identify important numbers, choose the correct operation, and check if your answer makes sense.

questions.prompt: Sara buys 3 notebooks for $4 each. How much does she spend?
A bus has 24 students. 6 students get off. How many remain?
Ali reads 15 pages each day for 5 days. How many pages does he read?
questions.hint: Multiply pages per day by number of days.

questions.prompt: A pizza is cut into 8 slices. You eat 3 slices. What fraction is left?
What should you do first when solving a word problem?
